title: Bare Bones Splash XP Bottel
description: Changes the boring XP bottle to a splash bottle
body:
Changes a normal XP bottle to a Splash bottle texture. Inspired by the one in Vanilla Tweaks. _Enjoy_!

![A preview of the texturepack ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pHqfmtaR/images/4c5a7d7dfa095215ca4825e7a6acb3bd2c462544.png)
